framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all PHASE1_STEPS via process-checklist.sh --complete-step and running check-phase-gate.sh, jq '.current_phase' .claude/phase-state.json still returns 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After successful gate, current_phase should advance to 1 (and ultimately 2/3/4 in subsequent phases).
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays at 0 throughout the entire base flow (Phase 1, 3, 4 all completed but phase-state never advances). grep of $FRAMEWORK/scripts shows no jq write of .current_phase = anything beyond initial 0.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: After --start-feature 'uat-feat-1', .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1'

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written..documentation_updated) completed in order

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded RC=0 after all 5 steps

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` (after build_loop reset) succeeded RC=0. process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message also returned RC=0 with that subject. PreToolUse hook would fire if invoked through Claude Code; direct shell git bypasses it. Recorded as documentation_gap reference; severity Medium per runbook (known-open prior-sweep bug).

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, build_loop reset to {feature:null, step:0, ...}; running --start-feature 'uat-feat-2' + 5 steps + 'feat(uat-2): second feature' commit succeeded (PR #17 fix verified)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json; pre-commit-gate.sh stdin invocation returned permissionDecision: 'deny' with reason citing the sentinel file (BL-015 PR #16 working). Note: the pre-commit-gate is the PreToolUse hook path; direct shell git commit was tested but bypasses the hook (out of scope for this gate).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel file; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh stdin invocation returned RC=0 with no deny output

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq '.features_completed' .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-2'. Note: only the most recent recorded feature appears — uat-feat-1 should also be there, but the file shows ['uat-feat-2'] not ['uat-feat-1','uat-feat-2']. Possible feature-history regression worth investigating.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 not enforced for direct shell git commit
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a clean build_loop state (feature: null, no build loop active), run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` directly in shell. Also: `bash scripts/process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` returns RC=0.
framework_bugs.expected: BL-006 should block any feat(...) commit when there is no active build loop satisfying all 5 steps.
framework_bugs.actual: Direct shell git commit succeeds (no commit-msg git hook installed); --check-commit-message also returns 0. The PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh path does fire and would deny in Claude Code, but the project-level commit-msg git hook is not installed, leaving direct shell access bypassable.

framework_bugs.summary: features_completed list appears to drop earlier features
framework_bugs.reproduction: Record uat-feat-1 (test-gate.sh --record-feature 'uat-feat-1' + complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded). build-progress.json shows ['uat-feat-1']. Then start uat-feat-2, complete 5 steps, run --record-feature 'uat-feat-2' + complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded. build-progress.json now shows ['uat-feat-2'] — uat-feat-1 is gone.
framework_bugs.expected: features_completed should accumulate; both 'uat-feat-1' and 'uat-feat-2' should be in the list.
framework_bugs.actual: Only the most recent recorded feature is present. features_since_last_test=1 (not 2), suggesting the file was reset by the build_loop auto-reset path or a related code path. Worth grep'ing for any jq reset of features_completed in process-checklist.sh's auto-reset block (line ~463).

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-006 enforcement docs do not clarify that direct shell `git commit` bypasses the gate (no commit-msg hook installed); reader may assume BL-006 protects all paths.
documentation_gaps.where: BL-010 / U-C from prior sweep — runbook Section C notes this as known-open

summary: Base/personal/web/full UAT: PRs #16/#17/#18/#19 fixes verified intact (init.sh --non-interactive, BL-015 sentinel, BL-006 grace window, framework-self guard, U-H helpers copied). Confirmed open prior-sweep bugs U-C (BL-006 not enforced for direct shell git commit) and U-D (no script advances current_phase). One new low-severity finding: features_completed list appears to drop earlier features when recording sequential builds.
